title: Department Manager Vacancy at FitOn - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at FitOn - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, FitOn in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FitOn:
FitOn is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FitOn!
